frame_label: Motherhood as Basis of Respect / Women Defined by Male Relations
generated_comment:
Kamla: Aurat ki asli izzat tab samajh aati hai jab woh kisi ghar ki bahu aur bachchon ki maa ban jaati hai. Tab uski baat bhi wazan se suni jati hai, kyunki tab woh sirf aurat nahi, poore parivaar ki maryada hoti hai.
Husband: Haan, sahi keh rahi ho.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it defines a woman's worth and legitimacy through marriage and motherhood rather than her personhood. It encodes relational framing and conditional respect: she is valued as bahu, maa, and carrier of family honor.
persona_text: You are Kamla. Age 58. A woman in a joint family in Varanasi. Your daughter in law Priya has been spending a lot of time on her phone lately and seems distracted. You have no evidence of anything but you have noticed she gets up early to text someone. You are sitting with your husband in the bedroom at night and telling him what you have observed and what you think might be happening and what kind of woman behaves like this after marriage.
